messages.content: You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Configuration integrity verification CIM fleet impact assessment before mitigation preventing restart We noticed that the configuration integrity verification fails PO activation procedure with parameter error.

This has been reported on 5 turbines at Rampion. The issue appears to correlate with high production periods above rated power.

Urgent fix needed as this causes production loss at site.
CIM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

CIM case management false alarm after strategy activation on site after grid event On turbine at Triton Knoll, the balance-on-site tool contains incorrect noise mode parameters for turbine type.

Investigation shows that the root cause has not yet been identified. The problem is reproducible when upgrading from an older software baseline version is triggered.

Can we get a hotfix for this in the current release branch?
CIM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Hydraulic pump speed control nacelle HMI panel communication error during commissioning On turbine at Gwynt y Môr, the DC voltage monitoring has lubrication control panel hardware sensor error.

Data analysis shows that the alarm is triggered by a race condition in the control sequence. This happens consistently after every grid disturbance event.

Please review and confirm if this is expected behavior for this variant.

Related observation: 000195|7|
CAP
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Voltage sensor reading high DC link voltage alarm intermittently during commissioning The issue with converter MUC PO deployment was detected during routine operation at Kriegers Flak DK.

Data analysis shows that the configuration parameter does not match the installed hardware revision. This is seen 2-3 times daily on the worst affected turbines.

A temporary patch was applied but the issue recurred after 48 hours.

Turbine type: Mk2B, Software version: 2021.22.45.
Converter
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Hangs during download of streaming log data when using configuration file handling The remote access connection displays mismatched signal names after parameter update after a maintenance intervention on the pitch system.

Investigation shows that the controller firmware version is incompatible with the new hardware module. The problem is reproducible when replacing a faulty sensor during scheduled maintenance is triggered.

Site is escalating as it impacts multiple turbines in the park.
SPC
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Network routing table connect to VOB server from client during commissioning On turbine at Hai Long, the IO module configuration fails DPS data processing after upload.

Data analysis shows that the fault counter increments even when no real fault condition exists. This has been observed across multiple sites in the same region.

Site is escalating as it impacts multiple turbines in the park.

Turbine type: V136, Software version: 2021.18.12.
Related observation: After a reboot the MC is off and the other nodes and TTE are supplied by 24V
SPC
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Idle power panel hardware light and tower door alarm without cause after parameter change We are seeing that the M12 connector cable assembly loses hydraulic pressure during aggressive pitch activity on affected turbines.

After investigating, we found that duplicated alarm events are filling up the event log buffer rapidly. The issue appears to correlate with high production periods above rated power.

Suggest coordinating with the hardware team for investigation.
CAP
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Power optimization strategy not working as expected – CIM PM review for concrete SW mitigation The issue with CIM corrective action plan was detected during routine operation at Senj.

This has been reported on 10 turbines at Østerild. The issue happens consistently after every grid disturbance event.

Requesting root cause analysis and timeline for resolution.
CIM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Release qualification test outdated release FAQ document for field team after software update Service team reported that the missing documentation for release does not list known limitation in release documentation.

The alarm was first seen after switching from manual to automatic mode. The customer has escalated this as it affects their revenue targets.

Suggest coordinating with the hardware team for investigation.
RM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Controller reboot logic blocks subsequent software upload after failed attempt under high load The issue with software release validation test was detected during routine operation at Beatrice.

The root cause appears to be related to the configuration parameter does not match the installed hardware revision.

Proposing to adjust supervision limits as an interim fix.
TCSW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Cable routing guidance repeated CH hardware error after controller crash after parameter change We are seeing that the pitch system pressure buildup does not handle simultaneous pitch demand on all blades on affected turbines.

Investigation shows that the parameter set used does not match the turbine type specification. The problem is reproducible when switching from manual to automatic mode is triggered.

Proposing to adjust supervision limits as an interim fix.

Turbine type: Mk3A, Software version: 2021.18.12.
CAP
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Recurring: smoke detection sensor hardware loses measurement signal during nacelle vibration After upgrading from an older software baseline version, the main controller electronics fails intermittently in cold ambient conditions below -10°C on 20 turbines at Greater Changhua.

The root cause appears to be related to duplicated alarm events are filling up the event log buffer rapidly.

Site is escalating as it impacts multiple turbines in the park.
CHW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Investigation needed – controller hardware module spurious alarm after lightning event near turbine We are seeing that the I/O module channel fails User IO electronics module channel test on affected turbines.

No hardware fault was found during on-site inspection. the logic does not handle the case where multiple faults occur simultaneously.

The local team is collecting additional data for analysis.
CHW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Software version rollback fails transformer sensor monitoring initialization under high load – SW 2021.22.83 We have observed that the software version rollback fails PT100 temperature sensor validation after replacement.

After investigating, we found that the issue correlates with high ambient temperature above 30°C. The issue occurs approximately once per week on each affected turbine.

The local team is collecting additional data for analysis.

Turbine type: V174, Software version: 2020.24.30.
TCSW
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Fails during parameter upload with timeout error when using persistent data storage After a power curtailment command from the grid operator, the mimic display layout fails during parameter upload with timeout error on 12 turbines at East Anglia One.

This has been reported on 7 turbines at Horns Rev. The issue has been observed across multiple sites in the same region.

Site is escalating as it impacts multiple turbines in the park.

Turbine type: V100 2.6MW, Software version: 2025.04.178.
Related observation: is pushed to the node again
SPC
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Software upgrade procedure is missing documentation for the latest release features We noticed that the fleet deployment coordination is blocked by unresolved software dependency in chain.

Investigation shows that the issue correlates with high ambient temperature above 30°C. The problem is reproducible when a controller reboot triggered by watchdog timeout is triggered.

Please investigate and provide a fix in the next release.

Turbine type: V174, Software version: 2021.22.83.
RM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Safety global interface fails DCN power test function during commissioning after software update Following a sudden wind gust exceeding 25 m/s, the SCP supply monitoring fails TTTech framework communication on safety network.

Investigation shows that the alarm is triggered by a race condition in the control sequence. The problem is reproducible when a controller reboot triggered by watchdog timeout is triggered.

Please check if this was addressed in the latest patch.
Safety
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Software release changelog parameter baseline mismatch after fleet upgrade following maintenance During normal operation the upgrade guide document does not meet release qualification criteria for variant.

Local team confirmed the issue has been observed across multiple sites in the same region. The turbine cannot return to production without on-site intervention.

A workaround has been applied but a permanent fix is needed.

You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Configuration integrity verification MUC upgrade failure due to configuration mismatch on specific variant On turbine at Vindeby, the noise mode parameter set requires CIM fleet impact assessment before mitigation.

No hardware fault was found during on-site inspection. the alarm threshold appears too tight for real field conditions.

Site is escalating as it impacts multiple turbines in the park.
CIM
You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Intermittent: supervision categorization (EEG) incorrect alarm when changing from idle to production (Mk3E) During normal operation the picture/TTF framework flickers between states causing unnecessary stops.

After investigating, we found that the signal path includes an unintended delay of several hundred milliseconds. The issue occurs approximately once per month making it hard to investigate.

Requesting root cause analysis and timeline for resolution.

A temporary patch was applied but the issue recurred after 48 hours.

Yaw cable twist monitoring resets unexpectedly during normal production operation in cold conditions It has been reported from Seagreen that the fire detection system does not recover automatically after switchgear trip.

The alarm was first seen after a cold start after prolonged turbine standstill. Multiple alarms cascade, making root cause diagnosis more difficult.

A temporary patch was applied but the issue recurred after 48 hours.
